name: Settings.Global | API reference
snippet:
Settings . Global | API reference | Android Developers .PendingMessages Interfaces .restrictions Overview Classes RestrictionsReceiver android .service. settings . ...
Convenience function for updating a single settings value as a floating point number. This will either create a new entry in the table if the given name does not exist, or modify the value of the existing row with that name.

name: [GUIDE] Enabling Vo5G/VoNR on T-Mobile (plus VoLTE
snippet: Apr 29, 2022 — the best way is to set NR-only in *#*#4636#*#* and then try to dial your voicemail. Be sure to set back to NR/LTE/GSM/WCDMA when done.

name: Need help with 5G SA VoNR setup #456
snippet: Enabling the VoNR switch. Setting the preffered mode to 5G and enabling Standalone (SA) setting "NR only" enabling two APNs, one internet and one ims.

name: 5G VoNR Network Mode - Apps on Google Play
snippet: May 4, 2026 — You can now change the network mode of your mobile manually as you want. There are many network modes that are hidden by the manufacture.

name: android.provider.Settings.Global - Documentation
snippet: Global system settings , containing preferences that always apply identically to all defined users. Applications can read these but are not allowed to write.

name: Enable VoNR support on Qualcomm devices
snippet: Mar 28, 2021 — This instruction helps you to enable VoNR (Voice over 5G New Radio – Phone calls over 5G-networks) support on your Qualcomm device.

name: Settings.Global - Android Developers

name: [GUIDE] How to enable access via adb on a new installed OS
snippet: There are (at least) two ways to enable access via adb: Bash: settings put global development_settings_enabled 1. settings put global adb_enabled 1. The latter can also be done in a script in an adb shell -- but of course we need a working adb connection ....
